title: Al Forthan Scholarship Essay
html:
Yahir's submitted essay for the al forthan scholarship at osu, framing the award as the foundation of his ability to break generational patterns and pursue higher education in Business Analytics. Signed "Yahir Gonzalez, 2021, Business Analytics, Oregon State University." (Embedded image is a scanned signature/photo — base64 stripped from summary.)

TL;DR

  • al forthan scholarship essay framing higher ed as a generational-pattern-break — Yahir-as-first-gen.
  • Yahir credits the al forthan community as a dependable network throughout osu.
  • Declares Business Analytics major (later switched to CS).
  • Same theme as first generation guilt and debt of gratitude — gratitude framed as inheritance.
  • Companion piece to other scholarship-application docs from this era (see ford family foundation intro).

al forthan · osu · first generation guilt · debt of gratitude · mom yahir · 2021 graduation
